name: 沙漠之鹰 | 霜寒之焰
nameZh: 沙漠之鹰 | 霜寒之焰
descriptionEn: As expensive as it is powerful, the Desert Eagle is an iconic pistol that is difficult to master but surprisingly accurate at long range. It has been custom painted with purple and blue flames using pearlescent paint. Contains exceptional qualities and abilities
descriptionZh: 杀伤力和它的卖价一样高，沙漠之鹰是一把很难驾驭，而在远距离又出乎意料精准的经典手枪。 使用珠光漆定制涂装了紫色和蓝色的火焰。 蕴含超凡品质与威能
